events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May was born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Ageless Rocker
angles.copy: 83 today! Mick Jagger, still strutting and singing after all these years. What's your ultimate Stones track?

events.title: MTV launched (1981)
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first music video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago, MTV launched with *that* iconic first video. Did video really kill the radio star, or just give us more ways to love music?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe' (1994)
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, featuring tracks like 'Supersonic' and 'Live Forever'.

angles.name: Britpop Debut
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of British music. What's your standout track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival took place (1969)
events.blurb: The iconic Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in music history, took place from August 15-18, 1969.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years since half a million gathered for three days of peace and music at Woodstock. Which legendary performance do you wish you'd seen live?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death (1977)
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977, at the age of 42. He would have been 91.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: Remembering Elvis Presley, who left us 49 years ago today at just 42. His music and legacy live on.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death (1996)
events.blurb: Tupac Shakur was shot in Las Vegas on September 7, 1996, and died from his injuries on September 13, 1996, at the age of 25. He would have been 55.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: 30 years since the music world lost Tupac Shakur. His impact on hip-hop and culture is still felt today. What's your favourite Tupac track?

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death (1970)
events.blurb: Legendary guitarist Jimi Hendrix passed away on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27. He would have been 84.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Remembering the unparalleled Jimi Hendrix, who would have been 84. His guitar work changed music forever. What's your favourite Hendrix riff?

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road' (1969)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Iconic Album
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That album cover, those tracks... pure genius. What's your favourite from it?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders frontwoman Chrissie Hynde was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Rock Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the brilliant Chrissie Hynde! A true rock icon with a voice that still captivates.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Mad For It
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing that rock 'n' roll swagger.

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' (1971)
events.blurb: John Lennon released his iconic song 'Imagine' on his album of the same name on September 9, 1971, in the US and October 24, 1971, in the UK.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon released 'Imagine'. A song that still resonates with its powerful message of peace and unity.

events.title: Apple released the first iPod (2001)
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the first-generation iPod on October 23, 2001, and it became available on November 10, 2001.

angles.name: 1000 Songs In Your Pocket
angles.copy: 25 years ago, Apple introduced the iPod and changed how we listen to music forever. Remember getting your first one?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated as James Bond Day, marking the anniversary of the world premiere of the first Bond film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! From the gadgets to the theme tunes, what's your favourite thing about 007?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: The legendary Beatles musician John Lennon was born on October 9, 1940. He was tragically killed in 1980.

angles.name: Remembering Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: British comedy legend John Cleese was born on October 27, 1939.

angles.name: Comedy Genius
angles.copy: Happy 87th birthday to the incomparable John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, a true master of comedy.

events.title: The Beatles released 'The White Album' (1968)
events.blurb: The Beatles released their self-titled double album, commonly known as 'The White Album', on November 22, 1968.

angles.name: Double Album Classic
angles.copy: 58 years since The Beatles unleashed 'The White Album'. A sprawling, diverse masterpiece. What's your hidden gem from the tracklist?
